name: Threads Insights
description: Collect post engagement metrics from Threads Insights API, detect viral posts, and auto-feed patterns.

queuePath.description: Path to queue.json. Defaults to data/queue.json.

stylePath.description: Path to style-data.json. Defaults to data/style-data.json.

popularPostsPath.description: Path to popular-posts.txt. Defaults to data/popular-posts.txt.

viralThreshold.description: Minimum views to consider a post viral. Default: 500.
